pathRules.rationale: Source plan documenting the migration and retained legacy names.
pathRules.policy: Update as phases complete; shrink allowlist as surfaces migrate.

pathRules.rationale: Inventory scanner and allowlist define retained legacy references.
pathRules.policy: Keep until Phase 6 strict current-surface checks pass repo-wide.

pathRules.rationale: Numbered milestone PRD batches are historical planning artifacts.
pathRules.policy: Move under docs/PRDs/archive/milestones/ in Phase 5 with link redirects.

pathRules.rationale: Standalone verify docs describe retired milestone gates.
pathRules.policy: Archive or replace with capability verification docs in Phase 5.

pathRules.rationale: Release checklists reference completed milestone gates.
pathRules.policy: Keep under archive index; do not use as current workflow entry points.

pathRules.rationale: Typed verification tooling replaces milestone-numbered script orchestration.
pathRules.policy: Keep as canonical implementation for check:docs and verify:release.

pathRules.rationale: Canonical capability fixture catalog with legacy id aliases.
pathRules.policy: Expand as conformance runners migrate off hard-coded milestone fixture paths.

pathRules.rationale: Repo scripts retain milestone gate names until typed tooling migration.
pathRules.policy: Migrate to tools/verify in Phase 2.

pathRules.rationale: Legacy milestone verification scripts remain during deprecation.
pathRules.policy: Wrap with typed tools in Phase 2; remove aliases in Phase 6.

pathRules.rationale: Examples retain milestone folder names and embedded paths during migration.
pathRules.policy: Rename maintained examples to capability names in Phase 3.

pathRules.rationale: Example folder names still carry milestone prefixes.
pathRules.policy: Rename to capability names in Phase 3 with CLI aliases.

pathRules.rationale: Templates retain milestone folder names during migration.
pathRules.policy: Rename to capability template names in Phase 3.

pathRules.rationale: Template folder names still carry milestone prefixes.
pathRules.policy: Rename to capability names in Phase 3 with CLI aliases.

pathRules.rationale: Conformance fixtures and catalogs retain milestone ids until catalog migration.
pathRules.policy: Resolve through canonical fixture-catalog.json in Phase 4.

pathRules.rationale: Checked-in native evidence artifacts use milestone output paths.
pathRules.policy: New reports use capability paths; old paths remain read-compatible.

pathRules.rationale: JSON Schema $id paths encode real schema versions, not milestone labels.
pathRules.policy: Do not rename without a dedicated schema compatibility PRD.

pathRules.rationale: CLI verification modules retain milestone filenames during migration.
pathRules.policy: Rename to capability modules in Phase 2/3.

pathRules.rationale: CLI commands, help text, and verification helpers retain legacy milestone labels.
pathRules.policy: Move user-facing output to capability language in Phases 2-3.

pathRules.rationale: Template registry exposes legacy v* template aliases.
pathRules.policy: Add canonical template names in Phase 3; tighten aliases in Phase 6.

pathRules.rationale: CLI tests assert legacy template and verification behavior during migration.
pathRules.policy: Update to canonical names as templates and gates migrate.

pathRules.rationale: Root package scripts expose verify:v* and check:docs:v* compatibility aliases.
pathRules.policy: Add verify:release and check:docs in Phase 2; remove legacy aliases in Phase 6.

pathRules.rationale: Root README still references milestone examples during migration.
pathRules.policy: Update command examples to canonical names in Phase 2.

pathRules.rationale: Docs index is a current entry point and must use capability language in active sections.
pathRules.policy: Keep milestone links only under historical archive sections; enforce with strict front-door checks.

pathRules.rationale: Status doc lists capability evidence while legacy command names remain in use.
pathRules.policy: Rewrite front door to capability language in Phase 5; retain command aliases until Phase 6.

pathRules.rationale: Parity tracker anchors evidence to legacy verify commands during migration.
pathRules.policy: Move evidence anchors to capability gates in Phase 5.

pathRules.rationale: Feature maturity matrix references milestone promotion history.
pathRules.policy: Reframe by capability in Phase 5.

pathRules.rationale: Workflow doc documents both legacy and target command names during migration.
pathRules.policy: Finalize canonical commands in Phase 6.

pathRules.rationale: Planning and historical verification docs reference milestone sequencing.
pathRules.policy: Point current readers to STATUS and capability docs; archive historical pages in Phase 5.

pathRules.rationale: Agent guidance mentions milestone gates for historical release work.
pathRules.policy: Update current workflow guidance in Phase 5; keep archive context explicit.

pathRules.rationale: Native runtime tests and reports reference milestone fixture paths.
pathRules.policy: Update active labels to capability names in Phase 4.

pathRules.rationale: Runtime packages reference milestone examples, fixtures, and diagnostics.
pathRules.policy: Align references with canonical fixture and example names in Phases 3-4.

pathRules.rationale: Script tests lock legacy verifier and docs gate behavior.
pathRules.policy: Migrate assertions to canonical tool names in Phase 2.

pathRules.rationale: CI workflows may invoke legacy verify commands until migration completes.
pathRules.policy: Update to verify:release and check:docs in Phase 2.

pathRules.rationale: Concept and contract docs retain milestone promotion history until archive rewrite.
pathRules.policy: Reframe by capability and archive historical pages in Phase 5.

requiredFrontDoorPhrases.message: docs/README.md must link the versioned-debt cleanup PRD.
docs/STATUS.md must link the versioned-debt cleanup PRD.
docs/STATUS.md must state that version labels are legacy milestone names.
